channel.title: Python on Loop & Retry
channel.description: Recent content in Python on Loop & Retry

item.title: Retry budgets by language: Python, Go, and JavaScript
item.description: A retry budget is a language-agnostic idea, but the place you enforce it is not. Python’s tenacity decorators, Go’s context-plus-backoff, and JavaScript’s promise chains each make a different mistake easy and a different guarantee hard. Where the shared budget lives, and the per-language trap that leaks it.
